inputs.label: Ounces
inputs.businessContext: Weight in avoirdupois ounces (1 oz = 28.349523125 g).

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight in avoirdupois ounces (1 oz = 28.349523125 g).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Avoirdupois ons cinsinden ağırlık (1 oz = 28,349523125 g).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids en onces avoirdupois (1 oz = 28,349523125 g).
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso en onzas avoirdupois (1 oz = 28.349523125 g).

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Grams per ounce. Override for troy ounce (31.1034768 g) or other standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Grams per ounce. Override for troy ounce (31.1034768 g) or other standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ons başına gram. Troy ons (31,1034768 g) veya diğer standartlar için geçersiz kılın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gramm pro Unze. Für Feinunze (31,1034768 g) oder andere Standards überschreiben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Grammes par once. Surcharger pour l'once troy (31,1034768 g) ou d'autres normes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gramos por onza. Sobrescriba para onza troy (31.1034768 g) u otros estándares.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الجرامات لكل أونصة. يمكن تجاوز القيمة لأونصة تروي (31.1034768 جم) أو معايير أخرى.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (± oz)
inputs.businessContext: Uncertainty of the weighing device in ounces, for propagating error into grams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Uncertainty of the weighing device in ounces, for propagating error into grams.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tartı cihazının ons cinsinden belirsizliği, hatayı grama yaymak için.
businessContext_i18n.de: Unsicherheit der Waage in Unzen zur Fehlerfortpflanzung in Gramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude de l'appareil de pesée en onces, pour propager l'erreur en grammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incertidumbre del dispositivo de pesaje en onzas, para propagar el error a gramos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدم اليقين لجهاز الوزن بالأوقية، لنشر الخطأ إلى الجرامات.

inputs.label: Output Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Desired number of decimal places for the displayed converted value (informational, not used in raw computation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired number of decimal places for the displayed converted value (informational, not used in raw computation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Görüntülenen dönüştürülmüş değer için istenen ondalık basamak sayısı (bilgilendirme amaçlıdır, ham hesaplamada kullanılmaz).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Anzahl Dezimalstellen für den angezeigten umgerechneten Wert (informativ, nicht in der Berechnung verwendet).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales souhaité pour la valeur convertie affichée (informatif, non utilisé dans le calcul brut).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número deseado de decimales para el valor convertido mostrado (informativo, no se usa en el cálculo bruto).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المنازل العشرية المطلوب للقيمة المحولة المعروضة (معلوماتي، لا يُستخدم في الحساب الخام).

inputs.label: Batch Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Factor to scale the conversion for multiple identical items (e.g., number of units in a batch).

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor to scale the conversion for multiple identical items (e.g., number of units in a batch).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birden fazla özdeş öğe için dönüşümü ölçeklendirme faktörü (örneğin, bir partideki birim sayısı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor zur Skalierung der Umrechnung für mehrere identische Artikel (z. B. Anzahl Einheiten in einer Charge).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur pour mettre à l'échelle la conversion pour plusieurs articles identiques (ex. nombre d'unités dans un lot).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor para escalar la conversión para múltiples artículos idénticos (ej. número de unidades en un lote).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل لقياس التحويل لعدة عناصر متطابقة (مثل عدد الوحدات في دفعة).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
